name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) governing the delivery of professional services under statements of work.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.help: The date this Agreement takes effect.

fields.label: SOW Term
fields.help: The duration or end date of the Statement of Work (e.g. '12 months from Effective Date').

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.help: The U.S. state or jurisdiction whose law governs this Agreement (e.g. Delaware).

fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.help: The courts where disputes will be brought (e.g. 'state and federal courts of San Francisco, California').

fields.label: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
fields.help: Whether the parties have a separate Data Processing Agreement governing personal data.

fields.label: Security Policy
fields.help: URL or name of the Provider's security policy that governs its security obligations, if any.

fields.label: Additional Warranties
fields.help: Any additional warranties both parties must comply with beyond the standard mutual warranties.

fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.help: The maximum total cumulative liability for general claims (e.g. fees paid in the prior 12 months).

fields.label: Increased Cap Amount
fields.help: Higher liability cap that applies to Increased Claims, if any.

fields.label: Increased Claims
fields.help: Categories of claims subject to the Increased Cap Amount (e.g. IP indemnification, data breach).

fields.label: Unlimited Claims
fields.help: Categories of claims exempt from any liability cap (e.g. fraud, willful misconduct, death/personal injury).
